stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 2, in order to indicate their relative path to an observer, all aircraft moving on the movement area of an aerodrome shall display navigation lights…

options.a: whenever the pilot-in-command of the aircraft considers necessary.
options.b: from sunset to sunrise and when low visibility procedures are in place.
options.c: from sunset to sunrise or during any other period prescribed by the appropriate authority.
options.d: during day and night unless otherwise prescribed by the appropriate authority.
